lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: If I were as ugly as you I would not dare to show my face in public!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Out of my way, punk.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Hmm... you smell strange...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Strange how?

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Like a human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! Er... I just ate one is why!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Don't talk to me again if you value your life!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Get lost!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: I don't have anything to give you so leave me alone, mendicant.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Have you no manners?

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: I don't have time for this right now.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: I have no interest in talking to a pathetic meat bag like yourself.

sections.title: When wearing the ring of charos

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Down with rutabagas!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: I may be a werewolf, but I do love the smell of frying onions.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Onion skins very thin, mild winter coming in. Onion skins very tough, coming winter very rough.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Did you know the onion is of genus Allium and species cepa?

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: When you cut onions they release a gas that makes you cry.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Maybe I'll start an Onion Guild.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: People are like onions. They have lots of layers and sometimes smell quite pungent.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: If you hear an onion ring, answer it!

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: Life is like an onion...well, sort of.

lines.speaker: Imre
lines.text: I might try my hand at farming onions some time.
